mapper.sql: id, ploy_type, ploy_name, import_status, signal_date, is_use, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gupiao_import_result (ploy_type, ploy_name, signal_date) VALUE (#{result.ployType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{result.ployName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result.signalDate, jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM gupiao_import_result WHERE is_use=1 AND signal_date=#{signalDate, jdbcType=DATE} AND ploy_type=#{ployType, jdbcType=INTEGER}
SELECT FROM gupiao_import_result WHERE is_use=1 AND signal_date=#{signalDate, jdbcType=DATE}
SELECT DISTINCT signal_date FROM gupiao_import_result WHERE is_use=1 AND import_status=2 ORDER BY signal_date DESC LIMIT #{size, jdbcType=INTEGER}
SELECT FROM gupiao_import_result WHERE is_use=1 AND import_status=2 ORDER BY signal_date DESC LIMIT 1
